macro.title: Live: Best Buy CEO to leave as company seeks path to steady growth - Star Tribune
macro.summary: Corie Barry will step down; company lifer Jason Bonfig will take the helm in November.

macro.title: Anthropic’s most dangerous AI model just fell into the wrong hands - The Verge
macro.summary: Anthropic’s powerful Mythos cybersecurity AI model has been accessed by a “small group of unauthorised users.”

macro.title: How the airline industry could be impacted if Spirit Airlines is liquidated - NPR
macro.summary: Spirit has not confirmed a liquidation, though it has filed for bankruptcy protection twice. Experts predict rising fuel costs could push the company to close its doors for good.

macro.title: Fed chair pick Warsh makes case for smaller Fed holdings in hearing - KSL News
macro.summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's Federal Reserve chair nominee, told a Senate panel on Tuesday he would work with the Treasury Department to create a smaller Fed balance sheet.

macro.title: Stock futures rise after Trump extends ceasefire with Iran: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: President Donald Trump extended the U.S. ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday afternoon.
